title: Party dimension row (canonical, time-invariant)
description: Logical contract for one row of datasets/elections/dim_parties.parquet. One row per party_id. Mirror of the citizen-relevant subset of datasets/taxonomy/parties.json (short_name, full_name, recognition); the JSON registry remains the operator-editable source-of-truth, this Parquet table is the frontend-readable canonical view. Sub-phase 1.2b of TODO/20260517-canonical-long-format-pivot.md.

x-changelog.description: Initial dim_parties schema. Columns: party_id PK, eci_code, short_name, full_name, recognition, source_id.

eci_code.description: ECI numeric/alpha party code if known. Multiple aliases collapse to one party_id; this carries the primary code only.

short_name.description: Display abbreviation (e.g. 'DMK', 'BJP'). Citizens see this in result tables.

recognition.description: ECI recognition status. Nullable when not yet classified.

source_id.description: FK -> taxonomy/sources.parquet. The provenance row for the parties.json registry that seeded this entry.
